b:with.value: "window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons

div.style: margin-bottom:15px; display:flex; gap:10px; border-bottom:1px solid #eee; padding-bottom:10px;

b:with.value: "window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons

div.p: বাংলাদেশের সবচেয়ে জনপ্রিয় নিউজ ডিরেক্টরি এবং ইনফরমেশন পোর্টাল। আমরা দেশ-বিদেশের সঠিক সংবাদ সবার আগে আপনার কাছে পৌঁছে দিতে বদ্ধপরিকর।

div.style: text-align:center; margin-top:60px; padding-top:20px; border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); font-size:13px; color:#9aa0a6;

div.div: © document.write(new Date().getFullYear()) NEWS PORTAL BANGLA. Built for AdSense Approval.

div.style: position:fixed; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; background:white; z-index:9999; display:none; flex-direction:column;
background:var(--pro-secondary); color:white; padding:12px 25px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;

a.style: background:var(--pro-primary); color:white; padding:6px 15px; border-radius:4px; text-decoration:none; font-size:13px;

button.style: background:#fff; border:none; padding:6px 15px; cursor:pointer; font-weight:700; border-radius:4px;
